title: clematis villosa subsp. oligophylla
intro: Clematis villosa subsp. oligophylla, also known as the hairy clematis or hairy virgin's bower, is a plant species belonging to the Clematis genus. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits associated with Clematis villosa subsp. oligophylla include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
